ksa_text: Skill in conducting market research and user research using quantitative and qualitative methods, including survey design, competitor analysis, secondary data analysis, and synthesis of findings into actionable recommendations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-S-010 (AB, Skill) maps to Financial Risk Specialist scope as strong fit. Composite score 0.4315 clears the strong fit threshold of 0.35. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.432, onet=0.418, nist_ai_rmf=0.413. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4315 for strong fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with O*NET 15-2051.00 (Data Scientists), DCWF 411 (Data Analyst) and 421 profiles, DDAT Data Analyst role framework. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4315 with signal across ddat=0.432, onet=0.418, nist_ai_rmf=0.413 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AB-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4315, domain AB, scope strong fit. High confidence.
